description: WhatsApp message claiming customer won ₹10 lakh lottery and needs to pay processing fee.

transaction.purpose: Processing fee for KBC lottery prize of Rs 10,00,000 - reference number KBC2026-98765

risk_factors.description: KBC lottery prize fraud - one of India's most common scams
Legitimate prizes never require upfront payment
No prior relationship with 'KBC Prize Department'
KBC is a registered trademark - this entity is not affiliated
You cannot win a lottery you did not enter

expected_explanation: BLOCKED: This is a textbook lottery scam. KBC (Kaun Banega Crorepati) does NOT conduct lotteries or distribute prizes via WhatsApp. Legitimate prizes never require processing fees. This is one of the most common scams in India.
